steps.title: Identify the sample proportion
steps.content:
In the sample of 50 people, 7 preferred chocolate. The sample proportion is:
$$\frac{7}{50} = 0.14$$

steps.title: Apply the proportion to estimate the population
steps.content:
To estimate how many people in the entire town would prefer chocolate, multiply the sample proportion by the total population:
$$0.14 \times 14,878 = 2,082.92$$
This is closest to 2,100 among the answer choices. That matches choice B — B is correct.
